product.name: SML Leviathan Matrix API
product.tagline: Institutional equity squeeze intelligence — pay-per-call for AI agents
product.description: The SML Leviathan Matrix is a real-time market intelligence API purpose-built for AI agents and institutional traders. Agents pay USDC on Base via the x402 protocol — no API keys, no human sign-up required. Specializes in US equity short-squeeze detection, multi-factor regime analysis, and momentum signals. Ed25519-signed responses guarantee data integrity on every payload.
differentiators: Short-squeeze pressure engine — the lane crypto-only rivals leave empty
x402 USDC micropayments — agents pay per call autonomously
Ed25519-signed responses — cryptographic integrity on every payload
AP2 protocol support — W3C VC mandate verification
30% affiliate revenue-share paid in USDC on Base
Loyalty credits — Bronze → Silver → Gold → Platinum tiers
Always-on Render Starter — zero cold starts

per_call_endpoints.name: Squeeze
per_call_endpoints.description: Short-squeeze pressure engine — the core differentiator

subscription_tiers.name: Shadow (Delayed)
subscription_tiers.description: 65-minute delayed data — no auth required, ideal for backtesting

subscription_tiers.name: Standard
subscription_tiers.description: Real-time feed — bearer token issued after x402 payment

subscription_tiers.name: VIP
subscription_tiers.description: Zero-hop priority data — lowest latency, VIP-only endpoints

loyalty.mechanism: Credits accrue per paid call — redeem for free calls

free_endpoints: GET / — service index, public key, tier prices
GET /loyalty/:wallet — loyalty tier and credit balance
target_users: AI agents needing autonomous market data access

ecosystem.description: ScriptMasterLabs builds x402 micropayment infrastructure, AI agent trust systems, and institutional market intelligence tools. All products interoperate via the x402 protocol for agent-native payments.

related_products.name: SqueezeOS
related_products.role: Institutional AI trading intelligence MCP server
related_products.description: 33 MCP tools — short-squeeze detection, options flow, IWM 0DTE scoring, council verdicts, peer signal marketplace. Pay-per-signal in RLUSD on XRP Ledger via x402.

related_products.name: Ghost Layer
related_products.description: Private routing engine with XRPL+Base micropayment toll, Xahau hooks intelligence, and URIToken minting. Go service, zero logging.

related_products.name: Aetheris-MCP
related_products.description: SSE MCP server with JSDOM-sanitized web scraping behind an on-chain x402 USDC micropayment interceptor. Content returned as clean ad-free Markdown.

related_products.name: Aetheris Client SDK
related_products.role: TypeScript x402 payment SDK for Aetheris-MCP
related_products.description: Official npm SDK that auto-intercepts HTTP 402 challenges and settles USDC payments on Base — no manual payment handling needed.

related_products.name: CrawlToll
related_products.description: Metered web crawling with x402 micropayment gating. Agents pay per crawl in USDC or RLUSD.

related_products.name: ZeroQuery Protocol
related_products.role: Privacy-preserving intent ranking with ZK proofs
related_products.description: SDK + Anchor program for ranking user intents without leaking raw queries. Groth16 ZK proofs (Poseidon hash) + pay-as-you-go SOL SaaS tiers.

related_products.name: AGO Orchestrator
related_products.description: Orchestration layer for ScriptMasterLabs autonomous agent workflows.

related_products.name: CodeAgentX
related_products.description: Dexter — 4-agent architecture for financial research. TTM Squeeze detection, MOASS scanner, institutional options flow, scheduled eagle-eye scans.

related_products.name: Printing Press Library
related_products.role: Published catalog of generated Go CLIs and MCP servers
related_products.description: Registry of type-safe Go CLIs and MCP servers produced by CLI Printing Press. Install any CLI via npx @mvanhorn/printing-press.
